title: BTETerraRenderer
description: Map renderer for the BuildTheEarth project. Updated fork because the original owner vanished.
body:
![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/refs/heads/main/core/src/main/resources/icon.png) # BTETerraRenderer ![workflow](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/actions/workflows/gradle.yml/badge.svg) [![Discord Chat](https://img.shields.io/discord/706317564904472627.svg)](https://discord.gg/gmPNqtWXmC) A map hologram rendering tool for the BuildTheEarth project.
Use this mod to easily map accurate road details and building tops. Logo by [vicrobex](https://github.com/vicrobex) ## Supported maps * Global * [OpenStreetMap](http://openstreetmap.org/) * [Bing maps](https://www.bing.com/maps/) * [Yandex.Maps](https://yandex.com/maps/) * [Google Earth](https://earth.google.com/web/) * (And many others) You can add other map services by adding/editing configuration files.
Visit the [wiki page](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/wiki) for more information. ## How to use 1. [Download](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/releases) the latest version of the mod 2. Put the mod in the `mods` folder 1. Open Minecraft Launcher and go to the `Installations` tab 2. Find the installation profile, hover your mouse on it, and click the folder icon 3. The `mods` folder is there 3. Run Minecraft ## Controls | Key | Description | |-------------------|-----------------------------------------------| | `` ` ``(Backtick) | Opens render settings UI | | `R` | Toggles map rendering | | `Y` | Moves map up along the Y-axis by 0.5 blocks | | `I` | Moves map down along the Y-axis by 0.5 blocks | ## Screenshots ![Reference screenshot](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/blob/main/docs/screenshot0.png?raw=true "Location: Seattle, Washington State, USA") ![Reference screenshot](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/blob/main/docs/screenshot1.png?raw=true "Location: Manhattan, New York, USA") Visit this [wiki page](https://github.com/BuildTheEarth/BTETerraRenderer/wiki/How-to-Add-Google-Earth) for more information on how to add Google Earth as a map source. ## Additional Info: This is an updated version of the original mod, BTETerraRenderer, created by tf2mandeokyi (https://github.com/tf2mandeokyi/BTETerraRenderer). We tried reaching out to the creator multiple times on different platforms, but received no response. The focus is on fixing bugs, supporting new versions, and performing other maintenance work. Many thanks to @amr for his significant contributions to the new version.
